name: msprods-platform
description: MS Prods SaaS platform with Next.js frontend, Express API, Airtable Brain, Stripe and protected dashboard.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check apps/api/server.js && node --check apps/api/services/ai.service.js && node --check apps/api/services/airtable.service.js && node --check apps/api/services/recommendation.service.js && node --check apps/api/routes/auth.js && node --check apps/api/routes/chat.js && node --check apps/api/routes/stripe.js && node --check apps/api/routes/webhook-stripe.js && node --check apps/api/routes/access.js && node --check apps/api/middleware/auth.middleware.js && node --check security/jwt.js && node --check security/encryption.js && node --check security/webhooks-verification.js && node --check public/chat-widget.js
